caption: The video shows two men in white clothing engaged in a conversation. The man on the left is younger, while the man on the right is an older man with gray hair. Both are wearing white traditional Indian garments. Throughout the frames, the younger man is gesturing with his hand while speaking to the older man, who listens attentively. The scene is overlaid with a news broadcast graphic featuring red and white banners. At the top, text reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". The bottom banner reads "HAM के संतोष कुमार सुमन मंत्री बने", accompanied by a clock showing "10:03 PM". On the right side, there are small portraits and names of "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार" and "विजय चौधरी", both labeled as "मंत्री". In the later frames, additional text on the left side identifies "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार". The visual composition remains largely static, with only subtle shifts in the men's facial expressions and hand gestures.
